findings.title: subprocess with shell=True on a tool parameter
findings.detail: subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True) where cmd derives from the run_command tool's parameter
findings.remediation: Use an argv list; never shell=True on caller-influenced input.

findings.title: mutating tool registered with no visible gate
findings.detail: delete_records is a mutating @mcp.tool() with no permission-group gate or env-flag opt-in in its file
findings.remediation: Gate the tool behind an explicit permission group, default OFF.

findings.title: hardcoded secret assignment
findings.remediation: Move to an env var, or keep as an obviously-fake fixture value.
